text:
Created attachment 147161
powerdns-recursor-3.6.1.patch

- Update to 3.6.1
PowerDNS Security Advisory 2014-01: PowerDNS Recursor 3.6.1 can be crashed remotely
URL: http://doc.powerdns.com/html/powerdns-advisory-2014-01.html

Also added a patch to fix compilation on FreeBSD 10 with clang which didn't make it upstream at the time of release

Port maintainer (sten@blinkenlights.nl) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 1.02 (mode: update, diff: SVN)
